title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. jovimontis
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. jovimontis is a lesser-known plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Hieracium schmidtii subsp. jovimontis is typically combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
